final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: cultural-brand-poster
Asset type: modern art poster for cultural festival or brand promotion
Primary request: Dunhuang flying apsara (Feitian) reimagined in contemporary Guochao illustration style, balancing tradition and modernity
Scene/backdrop: arched cave structure from Dunhuong grottoes blended with modern geometric patterns, clouds, lotus flowers, pomegranate blossoms, scattered petals
Subject: elegant flying apsara (celestial maiden) in modified Dunhuang mural costume, fluid dynamic ribbons, holding a pipa lute, graceful dancing posture
Style/medium: Guochao illustration, Chinese contemporary art style, digital painting with traditional ink aesthetics
Composition/framing: centered figure, full and dynamic composition with visual tension, decorative border elements
Lighting/mood: ethereal and luminous atmosphere, spiritual and celebratory mood
Color palette: rich and opulent palette transitioning from traditional mineral pigments (azurite blue, cinnabar red, ochre brown) to modern gradients (purple and gold)
Materials/textures: flowing silk ribbons, stone texture of cave walls, delicate petals, metallic gold accents
Text (verbatim): "字体设计融入传统篆刻元素"
Constraints: maintain balance between traditional Dunhuang aesthetics and contemporary design, keep the apsara as central focal point, preserve cultural authenticity
Avoid: 8K, masterpiece, ultra-detailed, plastic textures, Western fantasy tropes, cartoonish proportions, oversaturated neon colors
